title: Chief of Staff to Group CEO
description:
About the Role

Our client is a Singapore-headquartered financial technology group with a strong mission to expand access to protection, credit and digital financial infrastructure for underinsured and underserved communities across Asia and Africa.

As Chief of Staff to the Group CEO, this role serves as a trusted strategic partner to the Executive Chairman and CEO, supporting the shaping of priorities, driving execution and ensuring alignment across markets and functions. The position combines strategic advisory, execution oversight and stakeholder engagement.

This is a senior, hands-on leadership role, ideal for someone who thrives in fast-growing, dynamic environments and is comfortable operating at both board and execution levels.

Key Responsibilities

CEO Advisory & Strategy

  • Advise the CEO on strategic priorities, key decisions and trade-offs across growth, markets, partnerships and capital.
  • Structure issues, evaluate options and prepare clear, actionable recommendations.
  • Support CEO preparation for high-impact meetings, speeches and thought leadership engagements.

Strategy Execution & Business Rhythm

  • Translate the CEO’s vision into annual and quarterly priorities, OKRs and execution plans.
  • Track progress across functions and regions, identify risks early and drive resolution.
  • Lead selected strategic initiatives directly sponsored by the CEO.

External & Stakeholder Engagement

  • Support and, where appropriate, represent the CEO in engagements with partners, investors, regulators and ecosystem stakeholders.
  • Coordinate briefing materials, messaging and follow-ups for key external engagements.
  • Ensure consistency between CEO messaging and overall brand positioning.

CEO Office Leadership & Internal Alignment

  • Run the operating rhythm of the CEO Office, including leadership meetings, business reviews and offsites.
  • Drive clear, timely and consistent communication from the CEO across teams and regions.
  • Partner closely with the Chief of Staff, Executive Assistant and project teams to optimise CEO focus, prioritisation and effectiveness.

Profile & Requirements

  • 10–15 years of experience in a CEO Office, Chief of Staff, strategy, corporate development, consulting or senior management role.
  • Prior exposure to financial services, fintech, insurtech or embedded finance strongly preferred.
  • Experience working across Asia and/or Africa, particularly emerging markets, is an advantage.
  • Proven track record of supporting C-suite leaders in high-growth or transformation environments.
  • Strong strategic thinking paired with hands-on execution capability.
  • Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills, including board-level exposure.
  • Highly organised, adaptable and comfortable managing multiple workstreams.
  • Values-driven, low-ego and comfortable operating in a lean, mission-led organisation.


Ready to make an impact? We’d love to hear from you! Apply today by sending your resume to apply81@talentvis.com or click apply now!

**We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates would be notified

Talentvis Singapore Pte Ltd | EA License No: 04C3537

EA Personnel Name: Sherwin Wong | EA Personnel No: R1770151
